name: Sharplink, Inc.
business: Sharplink adopted Ether (ETH) as its primary treasury asset and participates in staking to earn rewards. The company also operates an online affiliate marketing network that delivers performance-based customer acquisition services to sportsbook and online casino gaming operators.
sellsTo: sportsbook and online casino gaming operators
public equity investors seeking digital asset exposure

exposures.sentence: Sharplink undertook a significant strategic shift in June 2025 in our business operations by becoming one of the world s largest publicly traded companies to adopt Ether ( ETH ), the native token of the Ethereum blockchain, as its primary treasury asset.
Our staking revenues are derived from the rewards we earn by actively participating in the Ethereum network s proof-of-stake consensus mechanism.
Our Affiliate Marketing segment is focused on performance-based customer acquisition services for leading sportsbooks and online casino gaming operators worldwide.

On December 20, 2025, the Company executed a strategic collaboration with Consensys Software Inc. ( CSI ), Ether.fi, Eigen Labs, and Anchorage Digital Bank N.A. to deploy a minimum of $200,000 of ETH from its treasury onto Linea, a Zero-knowledge Ethereum Virtual Machine ( zkEVM ) Layer 2 network, over an initial 24-month period.
As part of our ETH Treasury Management strategy, we participate in liquid staking through the Liquid Collective protocol.

catalysts.event: Launch of ETH-centered treasury strategy and establishment of ETH Treasury Management segment
catalysts.sentence: On June 2, 2025, we formally launched our ETH-centered treasury strategy and established ETH Treasury Management as a dedicated operating segment.

catalysts.event: Strategic collaboration to deploy ETH onto Linea Layer 2 network
catalysts.sentence: On December 20, 2025, the Company executed a strategic collaboration with Consensys Software Inc. ( CSI ), Ether.fi, Eigen Labs, and Anchorage Digital Bank N.A. to deploy a minimum of $200,000 of ETH from its treasury onto Linea, a Zero-knowledge Ethereum Virtual Machine ( zkEVM ) Layer 2 network, over an initial 24-month period.

catalysts.event: Initial deployment of assets to Linea
catalysts.sentence: On January 8, 2026, the Company completed its initial deployment of approximately $173,000 of assets to Linea, converting 54,987 ETH to 50,661 units of Wrapped Ether ( WeETH ) in connection with the deployment.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Superstate as Digital Transfer Agent for tokenization of common stock
catalysts.sentence: On September 24, 2025, the Company entered into a digital transfer agent agreement with Superstate Services LLC with the intent to tokenize the Company s Common Stock, par value $0.0001 per share (the Common Stock ) on the Ethereum blockchain.

tamClaims.claim: More than 200 U.S. public companies had adopted digital asset treasury strategies and raised more than an estimated $100 billion for crypto acquisitions by late 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to The National Law Review, by late 2025, more than 200 U.S. public companies had adopted digital asset treasury strategies and raised more than an estimated $100 billion for crypto acquisitions.

tamClaims.claim: Institutions have deployed over $18 billion in real-world assets on Ethereum (representing 900x growth since 2023).
tamClaims.sentence: Institutions have deployed over $18 billion in real-world assets on Ethereum (representing 900x growth since 2023).

tamClaims.claim: Ethereum protocols manage over $50 billion in assets with 72% market dominance.
tamClaims.sentence: In decentralized finance, Ethereum protocols manage over $50 billion in assets with 72% market dominance.
